title: Triplet
description: A clever spatial pattern puzzle game requiring alignment under logical rules. Easy to learn, challenging to master, and styled in a clean interface.
controls: Click, tap, or drag items on the screen to group or match them based on the rules.

title: GHST
description: A fast-paced interactive retro action experience. Challenge your reaction times, navigate obstacles, and beat your high scores.
controls: Use WASD / Arrow keys and screen interactions depending on gameplay modes.
